mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_check_in (user_id, activity_id, check_time, lon, lat, status) VALUES
(#{checkIn.userId}, #{checkIn.activityId}, #{checkIn.checkTime}, #{checkIn.lon}, #{checkIn.lat}, #{checkIn.status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_check_in SET status = 2 WHERE status = 0 AND activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.activity_id, a.title AS activityTitle, a.start_time, a.end_time, c.check_time, c.status, a.longitude, a.latitude FROM t_check_in c LEFT JOIN t_activity a ON c.activity_id = a.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND a.end_time >= CURDATE() AND a.start_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
